queries.query_string: condition: 'pulmonary embolism'; intervention: 'D-dimer' OR 'D dimer'; study type: observational diagnostic accuracy
queries.date_filter: study_start >= 2010-01-01 (post-Christopher era; covers ADJUST-PE 2014, YEARS 2017, PEGeD 2019, ADJUST-validation 2019)
queries.comment: PE-rule-out DTA studies are typically registered as management-outcome trials (ADJUST-PE NCT01134068, YEARS NCT02365129, PEGeD NCT02384135, ADJUST-validation NCT01624285) but the structured 2x2 results panel is rarely posted to CT.gov - results are published in the paired peer-reviewed paper. CT.gov returned 0 panels with extractable Sens/Spec for PE.

queries.query_string: condition: 'pulmonary embolism'; intervention: 'CT pulmonary angiography' AND 'D-dimer'; study type: observational
queries.comment: Imaging-protocol trials (CTPA radiation reduction, V/Q vs CTPA); none post a 2x2 panel for PE rule-out via D-dimer.

linked_registrations.comment: registry entry exists, results-panel-not-posted; data extracted from Lancet 2017 abstract
registry entry exists, results-panel-not-posted; data extracted from JAMA 2014 abstract (age-adjusted cutoff arm)
registry entry exists, results-panel-not-posted; FN=0 in management arm extracted from NEJM 2019 abstract
registry entry exists, results-panel-not-posted; data extracted from Lancet Haematol 2019 abstract

note: Extraction relies on PubMed-abstract back-computation (see pubmed_ddimer_pe_abstracts_2026-04-28.json). The dual-source two-tier structure used by the GeneXpert Ultra template is collapsed here into a PubMed-primary single tier because CT.gov returned no eligible records. Christopher Study (van Belle 2006) and Theunissen 2017 are not registered on CT.gov.
